package.name: exo_cmd
package.description: WSL-side ROS2 nodes for the exoskeleton serial loopback (exo_msgs M-A). Publishes /exo/cmd_heartbeat (exo_msgs/ExoCmd, 10 Hz; header.seq wraps mod 2^32, header.stamp_mono_ns, optional header.crc; payload decoupled from seq) and subscribes /exo/mcu_status (exo_msgs/ExoStatus) to verify the round-trip and monitor link health (RTT / loss / duplicate / reconciliation, contract §7), publishing /exo/link_health (exo_msgs/LinkHealth). Also ships a local loopback node with fault injection that mimics the MCU for hardware-free self-test. Interface contract: docs/01-ros2-microros-serial/01-接口契约.md (v1.7).
